confirmed.title: Versioning SKILL lists reusable React diff component as 'Por chegar' but <VersionDiff> already ships
confirmed.evidence: The PHP versioning SKILL 'Por chegar' (coming/future) section states: line 142 '- React `DiffViewer` component reutilizável (slice futura).' However, @arqel-dev/versioning already implements and publicly exports exactly this: packages-js/versioning/src/VersionDiff.tsx defines `<VersionDiff>` — a reusable, purely presentational side-by-side snapshot comparator (JSDoc: 'comparador side-by-side de duas snapshots', accepts arbitrary before/after objects, exported from src/index.ts alongside VersionDiffProps, DiffEntry, DiffStatus, getDiffEntries). The package index.ts explicitly documents 'Exporta <VersionTimeline> ... e <VersionDiff> (comparador side-by-side). Componentes puramente apresentacionais'. A reusable React diff component is shipped, not future. (Note: the separate line-140 bullet 'Version comparison API (diff entre duas versions arbitrárias)' is a PHP-side API and DOES remain unimplemented — no diff/compare method exists in packages/versioning/src — so only the line-142 DiffViewer bullet is stale.)
confirmed.fix: Remove the 'React `DiffViewer` component reutilizável (slice futura).' bullet from the 'Por chegar' section, or replace it with an accurate statement that `<VersionDiff>` is already delivered in @arqel-dev/versioning (exported from src/index.ts) and only a differently-scoped enhancement remains, if any.

verdict.reason: CONFIRMED and NEW. packages/versioning/SKILL.md:142 lists "React `DiffViewer` component reutilizável (slice futura)." under the "Por chegar" (future) section, but @arqel-dev/versioning already ships this component. packages-js/versioning/src/VersionDiff.tsx implements `<VersionDiff>` — a reusable, purely presentational side-by-side snapshot comparator (JSDoc line 2: "comparador side-by-side de duas snapshots"; props accept arbitrary before/after Record<string,unknown> objects). packages-js/versioning/src/index.ts publicly exports VersionDiff, VersionDiffProps, DiffEntry, DiffStatus, getDiffEntries, and its module docstring states it "Exporta ... <VersionDiff> (comparador side-by-side). Componentes puramente apresentacionais". So a reusable React diff component is shipped, not future. The finding correctly narrows scope: the neighboring line-140 bullet (PHP-side comparison API) does remain unimplemented (no diff/compare method in packages/versioning/src), so only line 142 is stale. Not covered by any SWEPT family — the swept "versioning JS SKILL 0.15.0" item concerned a version-line in a different file (packages-js SKILL), whereas this is a distinct "Por chegar" contradiction in the PHP-package SKILL.md never touched in rounds 1-20. Proposed fix: remove or correct the line-142 bullet. Actionable and verified against source.
